article_meta.title: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell on June 25, 2025, in Washington, DC

reasoning: Some genuine author-prose bias was correctly flagged, but there is at least one attribution violation and several clear misses. One label choice is also questionable.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Item 3 flags language that is explicitly attributed to Powell’s characterization, violating the rule against flagging attributed source statements.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Three of four items are defensible; the third is a false positive due to attribution and label issues.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple strong instances in author prose such as ‘Fed remains independent, for now,’ ‘Among the many problems with Trump’s demands…,’ ‘could backfire spectacularly on Trump,’ ‘The Trump administration also has a tough case to prove,’ and ‘existential threat’ framing.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels are mostly sound for items 1, 2, and 4, but item 3 is mislabeled as Slant and relies on attributed framing rather than author’s own claim.
